_comment: Demo script template. Copy this file, rename it to your topic (e.g. backpropagation.json), and fill in the content.

terms.intro: The opening message shown to the student. Set up the scenario, introduce the term, and end with the first question.

turns._comment: One turn = one question. The 'intro' already asked question 0, so turns[0] handles the student's first reply.
turns.on_correct: Acknowledgment of correct answer + transition to next question (or to teach-back if this is the last turn).
turns.on_partial: Acknowledge what's right, point out the gap, re-ask or nudge forward.
turns.on_stuck: Give a concrete hint using numbers from the scenario, then re-ask the same question more simply.

terms.teach_back_prompt: Now explain [term] to me in your own words, as if I've never heard of it.
terms.teach_back_pass: Great explanation! You've got it. [Brief reinforcement of the core idea.]
terms.teach_back_fail: Not quite. [Correct 1-2 sentence explanation of the core idea.] Let's move on.
